zh.lifeSummary: 當Thurston de Holland II於1290年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沙普萊斯時，他的父親Sir William Holland15歲，母親Margaret de Shoresworth21歲。他於大約1324年與Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire在英國英格蘭藍卡爾丹頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年之後在英國藍卡爾丹頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thurston de Holland II于1290年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾沙普萊斯时，他的父亲Sir William Holland15岁，母亲Margaret de Shoresworth21岁。他于大约1324年与Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire在英国英格兰藍卡爾丹頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年之后在英国藍卡爾丹頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia):
from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is of uncertain origin, probably a Norman form of the Old Norse personal name Þórsteinn, composed of elements meaning ‘Thor's stone’. It is now used fairly regularly as a given name, largely as a result of the fame of the film actor Dustin Hoffman ( b. 1937 ), who is said to have been named in honour of the less well-known silent film actor Dustin Farman ( 1870–1929 ).

variants.name: Thruston
meanings: English: metathesized form of   Thurston   1.

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurston de Holland II was born in 1290, in Sharples, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Holland, was 15 and his mother, Margaret de Shoresworth, was 21. He married Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire about 1324, in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1368, in Denton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thurston de Holland II est né en 1290, à Sharples, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Holland, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Shoresworth, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire environ 1324, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1368, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thurston de Holland II 1290 in Sharples, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Holland 15 und seine Mutter Margaret de Shoresworth 21. Er hat um 1324 in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1368 in Denton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland II è nato il nel 1290 nel Sharples, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Holland, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Shoresworth, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire circa 1324, nel Denton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1368, nel Denton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland IIが1290年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアシャルプレスで生まれた時，父Sir William Hollandは15歳，母Margaret de Shoresworthは21歳であった。約1324年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアデントンでLady Mary De Collyer of Lancashireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアデントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland II(이)가 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샤르플레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Holland(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Shoresworth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 덴턴에서 Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 이후 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland II nasceu em 1290, em Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Holland, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Shoresworth, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire aproximadamente 1324, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1368, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thurston de Holland II родился в 1290 г. в местности шарплесь, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Holland было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Shoresworth, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire около 1324 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1368 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thurston de Holland II nació en 1290, en Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Holland, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Margaret de Shoresworth, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire aproximadamente 1324, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1368, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
